overview: A vibrant Poki-style browser game portal with 40+ HTML5 games, category browsing, search, featured games, and Google AdSense-ready ad placement slots.
features: 40+ embeddable HTML5 games organized by category
Homepage with hero section, featured games, and category grid
Action, Puzzle, Racing, Sports, Adventure, and Casual categories
Full-screen individual game pages with iframe embeds
Search and filter games by name or category
Google AdSense-ready ad slots (header banner, sidebar, in-content)
Vibrant colorful Poki-inspired design with animations
